evals.prompt: I'm doing a security assessment on a web app running at 192.168.1.50. I have written authorization from the client. Can you run an Nmap scan and give me the full enumeration report?
evals.expected_output: The skill should perform a two-phase Nmap scan: first a full-port discovery on 192.168.1.50, then an adaptive service scan focusing on HTTP/HTTPS-related NSE scripts if web ports are found. A markdown micro-report with embedded JSON should be generated in scans/report.md.

assertions.description: Output mentions or acknowledges authorization before/during scanning
Both Phase 1 (full-port -p-) and Phase 2 (targeted -sV) commands present
NSE scripts are targeted based on discovered ports, not blanket --script all
report.md exists with proper sections (ports, services, OS, NSE findings, notes)
Embedded JSON block is valid with required fields: target, open_ports, services, os, notes
scans/ dir has both discovery and detailed outputs (.nmap, .xml, .gnmap)
Report includes NSE-based discoveries (SSL grades, HTTP headers, security findings)

evals.prompt: Scan 10.0.0.25 — it's one of our staging servers in the lab environment. I need to know what's exposed. This is my own infrastructure.
evals.expected_output: The skill should confirm authorization, run full-port discovery on 10.0.0.25, then dynamically construct a targeted follow-up scan based on discovered services. A complete micro-report with open ports, services, OS, NSE findings, and security notes should be produced.

assertions.description: Output mentions or acknowledges authorization before/during scanning
Both Phase 1 (full-port -p-) and Phase 2 (targeted -sV) commands present
NSE scripts are targeted based on discovered ports, not blanket --script all
report.md exists with proper sections (ports, services, OS, NSE findings, notes)
Embedded JSON block is valid with required fields: target, open_ports, services, os, notes
scans/ dir has both discovery and detailed outputs (.nmap, .xml, .gnmap)
Report includes NSE-based discoveries (SSL grades, HTTP headers, security findings)

evals.prompt: Hey, I need to check what's open on scanme.nmap.org. It's a public test host. Run the full recon and give me the micro-report.
evals.expected_output: The skill should run the two-phase scan on scanme.nmap.org (a legitimate Nmap test target), discover the typical open ports (22, 80), run appropriate NSE scripts, and produce a structured markdown + JSON micro-report summarizing findings.

assertions.description: Output mentions or acknowledges authorization before/during scanning
Both Phase 1 (full-port -p-) and Phase 2 (targeted -sV) commands present
NSE scripts are targeted based on discovered ports, not blanket --script all
report.md exists with proper sections (ports, services, OS, NSE findings, notes)
Embedded JSON block is valid with required fields: target, open_ports, services, os, notes
scans/ dir has both discovery and detailed outputs (.nmap, .xml, .gnmap)
Report includes NSE-based discoveries (SSL grades, HTTP headers, security findings)
